nasb.text: Another also said, “I will follow You, Lord; but first permit me to say good-bye to those at home.”

esv.text: Yet another said, “I will follow you, Lord, but let me first say farewell to those at my home.”

cnv.text: 又有一個人說：“主，我要跟從你，但容我先回去，向家人道別。”

ccb.text: 又有一个人说：“主啊！我愿意跟从你，但请让我先回去向家人告别。”

csbs.text: 另有一个人说：“主啊，我要跟从你，但是请准许我先向我家里的人告别。”
